properties.name: bulwark.crypto.enabled
properties.description: Whether the crypto-agility auto-configuration activates and wires the provider registry, envelope codec, audit sink, and DocumentSigner.

properties.name: bulwark.crypto.providers.jca.ed25519.enabled
properties.description: Whether the local JCA Ed25519 signature provider is registered.

properties.name: bulwark.crypto.providers.jca.ecdsa-p256.enabled
properties.description: Whether the local JCA ECDSA P-256 signature provider is registered.

properties.name: bulwark.crypto.providers.jca.ml-dsa-44-placeholder.enabled
properties.description: Whether the ML-DSA-44 placeholder provider is registered. Demonstrates the post-quantum migration seam; not a production signature provider.

properties.name: bulwark.crypto.local-ephemeral-keys.enabled
properties.description: Explicit local-development opt-in for process-local generated signing keys. Keep false outside local demos; production deployments bind key handles to app-owned key custody.
